maze.stairsNoUpperLayerAlert: Cannot place stairs on the top layer because there is no upper layer to connect.
maze.singleLayerOnlyAlert: Only single-layer mazes can be loaded into the editor.
account.authHint: Sign in to sync your saved mazes across sessions.
account.storageHint: Save the current maze, then reload any saved version when you need it.
account.libraryHint: Review your saved mazes, check when they were updated, or remove entries you no longer need.
account.notConfigured: Supabase is not configured. Please set frontend/.env first.
account.signUpSuccess: Sign-up successful. Check your confirmation email if enabled.
account.appUnavailable: Maze app is not available yet. Reload and try again.
account.noMazeToSave: No maze data available to save.
account.selectMazeFirst: Please select a maze from the list.
account.manageHint: Adjust sharing visibility, copy share link, or delete this maze.
account.shareUnavailable: Set visibility to Unlisted or Public before sharing.
generate.binaryTreeDescription: Fast algorithm that carves passages upward or to the right from each cell.
generate.recursiveBacktrackDescription: Depth-first style generator with long corridors and fewer dead-end clusters.
generate.recursiveDivisionDescription: Generates mazes by repeatedly dividing regions with walls and gates.
generate.primDescription: Builds maze like a randomized growing tree from frontier walls.
generate.kruskalDescription: Uses disjoint sets to connect cells while avoiding cycles.
generate.wilsonDescription: Uniform spanning tree approach using loop-erased random walks.
generate.minConnectorDistanceNote: Minimum Manhattan distance between connectors in the same layer.
generate.minConnectorsPerTransitionNote: Minimum connectors between each pair of adjacent layers. Use 0 for no limit.
generate.maxConnectorsPerTransitionNote: Maximum connectors between each pair of adjacent layers. Use 0 for no limit.
generate.complexityNote: For multi-layer mazes, complexity overrides shaft density.
generate.noGeneratorsForTopology: No generators are available for this topology yet.
generate.appUnavailable: Cannot generate maze right now. Reload page and try again.
solve.autoTopologyNote: Topology is inferred from the current maze automatically.
solve.singleLayerOnlyAlert: Solving is currently supported only for single-layer rectangular mazes.
solve.unsupportedTopologyAlert: This maze topology is not supported for solving yet.
solve.noPathFound: No path was found from start to exit.
preview.title: Preview
gui.previewClosedTooltip: Preview closed. Open a new preview window from Settings.
settings.adaptiveQualityTooltip: Automatically adjusts render quality based on real-time FPS to keep camera movement smooth.
settings.meshReductionHint: Only affects mazes where rows or cols reach the threshold.
settings.meshReductionStatusActive: Reduction is active for current maze.
settings.meshReductionStatusInactive: No visible reduction for current maze.
settings.meshReductionTooltip: Reduces draw calls by merging wall meshes when maze size reaches the threshold.
settings.hideEdgesDuringInteractionToolt: Temporarily hides edge lines while rotating the camera for smoother interaction.
settings.floorGridTooltip: Shows grid lines on maze floors, including the ground floor, to make path reading easier.
settings.showEdgesTooltip: Toggles wall edge outlines in the 3D maze view.
settings.showDebugTooltip: Shows or hides the debug overlay with render stats.
settings.showPreviewTooltip: Shows or hides the floating preview window. This toggle is unavailable when the preview window is fully closed.
settings.meshReductionThresholdTooltip: Set the maze size threshold where mesh reduction starts (rows or cols).
